description: X (Twitter) web automation playbook for ScreenHand using Chrome CDP + OCR fallback.

steps: Focus Chrome and use browser_tabs to get current X tab.
Navigate to compose URL or home.
Verify by opening profile and reading latest /status/{id} link.
guards: If X returns 'Whoops! You already said that.', regenerate unique copy and repost.
If type_text times out on long text, shorten copy and retry.
Keep one active Chrome window; avoid about:blank target drift.

steps: Click Delete and then confirm Delete in modal.
Create a fresh replacement post from compose.
replace_post_without_premium.why: Non-Premium accounts cannot edit posts reliably; delete+repost is the primary workflow.

steps: Open target status URL and open post menu.
Submit only via button text matching Update/Save.
Reload status URL and verify updated text.
guards: Abort if no Update/Save button is detected.
Do not click Reply when intending to edit.
Edit availability is restricted by account plan and post state.

steps: Open post menu and click Delete.
Confirm via [data-testid='confirmationSheetConfirm'] or dialog Delete button.
Reload status URL and verify deleted marker text.
Reply: click [data-testid='reply'], fill composer, click tweetButtonInline.
Repost: click [data-testid='retweet'] and choose repost option.

errors.context: Post menu shows Delete/Pin/etc but no Edit
errors.solution: Treat as non-editable; use delete+repost flow.

errors.context: Edit flow opened composer-like surface and submit hit Reply
errors.solution: Submit only when button label matches Update/Save; abort otherwise.

errors.context: X message: 'Whoops! You already said that.'
errors.solution: Regenerate unique copy and retry post.

errors.context: Multiple Chrome windows; OCR target drifts to about:blank
errors.solution: Close/ignore about:blank window and bind to X-titled window before click_text/type_text.

errors.context: No article/caret nodes despite visible tweet in UI
errors.solution: Fallback to OCR+Accessibility sequence; then return to CDP for verification.

errors.context: Bridge timeout on long multiline posts
errors.solution: Use shorter copy or DOM insert in editor where available.

editing: Editing requires X Premium tier support.
Editing is time-limited and state-limited (post history/reply state may block edit).
safety: Always verify target status URL before destructive actions.
Never auto-confirm delete without detecting delete dialog/button.
Never use Reply button as edit submit fallback.
